svg.title: AstralBeam wordmark
svg.desc: AstralBeam wordmark in a light, slightly tightened sans-serif style.
svg.metadata: AstralBeam wordmark construction: - Reusable id: #astralbeam-wordmark. - Same personality as the current wordmark. - Letter spacing tightened from 9 to 6 to pair with the clearer monogram.

text.font-family: Avenir Next, Avenir, Montserrat, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
